gameContext.customOverride:
Output ONE token: UP|DOWN|LEFT|RIGHT|WAIT
Win: clear all winA and betA; clear all winB and betB; clear all winC and betC; clear all winD and betD. Lose: all winA gone; all winB gone; all winC gone; all winD gone. Mechanics: collect arena to transform, collect pitA to transform, collect pitB to transform, collect pitC to transform, collect pitD to transform.
